form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th on March 31 over 425m at this track behind Leonessa beaten 5 lengths (24.53) in a Special conditions H. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (22.79) at Shepparton over 390m. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 425m at this track beaten 12 lengths (24.69) behind Who She Rules in a Special conditions H on March 31. Leading chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked turning into home straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Ballarat over 390m. Last start finished 3rd in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 11 over 390m at Ballarat behind Average Return beaten 5.5 lengths (22.74). Racing well and can find winning form again.

form.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (19.77) over 350m at Healesville. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

formComments.comment: Finished second at big odds last time (19.77) over 350m at Healesville. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Unbalanced and checked turning off back straight.

form.formComment: After failing to finish two starts back she came out and won by 1.75 lengths at Healesville (19.74) beating Darra Mick in a Bottom Up - Grade 6 on April 8. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

Slow to begin; Raced wide soon after start.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at his last three starts, the latest when third (26.31) at Shepparton. Jumps from the outside. Must be included.
